description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in free QBoard 1.1 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the qb_path parameter to (1) index.php, (2) about.php, (3) contact.php, (4) delete.php, (5) faq.php, (6) features.php or (7) history.php, a different set of vectors than CVE-2006-2998.
